# STRAT.039 ? Level 5 Leadership (Collins)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Humility + will; personal humility + professional will; ambition for organization not self; window/mirror; first who then what

## Application
Combine humility with fierce resolve; credit others (window); blame self (mirror); hire right people first; organizational ambition

## Key Values
- Humility + will
- Organizational ambition
- Right people
- Window/mirror
- Quiet determination

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, leadership_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
